programme.title: Half Brothers

But as she finds herself increasingly drawn to one of the suspects, Alison’s feelings about the case become complicated.

Although Zhi Ming had the chance to get the pendant back, he did not want to hurt Guo Ying. Guo Ying takes the chance and escapes with the pendant.

On their journey, they meet Tang Lian who is a disciple of the Tang sect. Together, the group of youths embark on an adventure.

Lightweight Tritan cup and removable blades make cleaning easy, while the compact, stylish design delivers full functionality for daily use. 全新上市，专利 45° 斜角刀片，轻松粉碎水果、冷冻食材与冰块，完美保留食材原味。倾斜漩涡设计，让食材混合顺滑，10 段速度随心调节。轻调理杯、可拆刀座，清洗方便，操作简单，功能全面又时尚。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Nature’s Farm Pycnogenol
programme.desc: Nature’s Farm Pycnogenol® is a premium antioxidant supplement made from 100% pure French Maritime Pine Bark extract (100mg), sourced exclusively from the Les Landes de Gascogne forest in France. Supported by over 160 clinical trials and 450 scientific studies, it helps fight oxidative stress and promotes overall wellness—benefiting the brain, eyes, heart, joints, skin, and blood sugar balance for all ages. NatureFarm's碧容健®，源自法国滨海松树皮萃取物，是一款高效天然抗氧化营养品。经过160项临床试验与450篇科学研究验证，全面帮助抵御氧化压力，守护大脑、眼睛、心脏、关节、肌肤及血糖健康，适合各年龄层日常保健

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Tupperware Freezable 5-Container Set
programme.desc: The Tupperware Freezable 5-Container Set makes meal prep and long-term storage easy, locking in freshness and flavour. Tupperware's No. 1 freezing containers feature a speedy-freeze design and flexible material for easy unmolding. Available in multiple sizes, there's a perfect container for every freezer storage need. Tupperware 冷冻保鲜 5 件套让备餐和长期储存变得便捷，有效锁住食物的新鲜度。作为 Tupperware 畅销第一的冷冻容器，它采用快速冷冻设计与柔韧材质，冷冻后轻松脱模。多种尺寸组合，能轻松满足各种冷冻储存的需求。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - ASD Hybrid 3-ply Hex Wok 32 & 36cm
programme.desc: This cookware is made with strong stainless steel and a long-lasting non-stick coating from Whitford (USA). Its 7-layer design ensures even heat distribution and helps keep heat longer, providing great cooking results every time. Perfect for those looking for high-quality, easy-to-use kitchen tools. ASD爱仕达316不锈钢不粘炒锅采用三层钢结构与耐高温不粘涂层，结合了不锈钢的耐用与不粘锅的便捷。蜂窝纹理设计省油防粘，食材加热均匀，不怕铁铲和钢丝球刮擦，适合烹饪各种坚硬食材。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - EBENE’s Bio-Ray Knee Guard with Tourmaline
programme.desc: The knee guard provides firm support and gentle compression around the kneecap to stabilize joints and reduce strain. Infused with Bio-Ray technology and tourmaline warmth, it promotes circulation, eases stiffness, and delivers lasting comfort. Lightweight and breathable, it keeps knees supported, protected, and ready for all-day wear. 护膝提供膝盖周围稳固支撑与轻柔加压，分担关节压力，减少磨损。结合日本生化能技术与托玛琳微热作用，促进血气循环、舒缓僵硬, 让膝盖在日常走动、运动中都保持稳定与健康， 降低磨损和退化风险。 透气材质，天天戴都舒适。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Acerpure Clean V2 Cordless Vacuum Cleaner
programme.desc: Transform the way you clean with the Acerpure Clean V2 cordless vacuum, designed for modern living. Its ultra-strong suction power and multi-stage filtration system capture even the finest dust in your homes. Lightweight yet powerful, it makes cleaning quick and comfortable with its ergonomic design and long-lasting battery. Acerpure V2 无线吸尘机， 四种刷头，满足全屋清洁需求。 1.37公斤超轻无线主机，轻盈好超控。三档模式，20000pa强劲气旋吸力，灰尘一扫而空。多角度掌控自如，让您更顺畅地左右移动，滑行或转向。轻巧却强劲有力，是您最佳的清洁伙伴。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Acerpure Water Purifier + Air Fryer
programme.desc: Upgrade your kitchen with the Acerpure Aqua WP5 Water Purifier and 2-in-1 Flip Air Fryer—the ultimate duo for convenience and health. Enjoy instant 99°C hot and 5°C cold water, perfectly filtered with 5-in-1 RO & double UV sterilization, while the 2-in-1 Flip Air Fryer lets you air fry, grill, or make soup with a quick 180° flip. Both are easy to use, safe, and efficient—smarter cooking and cleaner drinking water, all in one kitchen setup. 厨房必备组合：Acerpure Aqua WP5 滤净水器搭配2合1翻转气炸锅，理想组合，健康又方便。随时享用 99°C 热水 / 5°C 冷水，水质纯净安全（5合1 RO+双重UV杀菌）；翻转气炸锅可轻松实现 空气炸、烤肉、煮汤。操作简单、安全高效，干净饮水与轻松烹饪，一台搞定厨房大小事！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - LAC Joint Protect
programme.desc: The jelly form LAC Joint Protec contains glucosamine, chondroitin, type 2 collagen, anti-inflammatory herbs, which help repair cartilage and relieve joint inflammation. It tastes good, is easy to take and convenient. Start ""refueling"" the cartilage and synovial fluid early so that the joints can be used for a longer time! 果冻形态的关节保健品，含葡萄糖胺、软骨素、第2型胶原蛋白、抗炎草本等关节保健营养素，有助于修复软骨和缓解关节发炎症状，味道好，容易服用又方便。提早开始给软骨和滑液“加加油”，关节才能用得久、用得顺！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Naturalle Sugar Care Tea
programme.desc: Crafted from 100% natural leaves including gymnema, mulberry and green tea, the Naturalle Sugar Care tea is mild-flavoured and low in calories. A perfect post-meal beverage, this tea may help curb sugar cravings and support healthy post-meal blood sugar levels, making it great for individuals who frequently consume carbohydrate-rich or sugary foods. Naturalle 糖适宁茶采用 100% 天然叶材精制而成，包括匙羹藤、桑叶与绿茶，口感清淡、低热量。糖适宁茶是适合餐后饮用，有助于抑制对甜食的渴望和维持血糖健康水平，非常适合经常摄取高碳水或含糖食物的人士饮用

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Thomson Probiotic
programme.desc: Thomson ProbioGut is a premium probiotic supplement designed to support digestive health, boost immunity, and promote overall well-being. Formulated with two clinically researched Japanese probiotic strains—it helps improve gut flora, regulate bowel movements, and maintain a healthy body weight. Thomson ProbioGut 是一款优质的益生菌补充剂，专为支持消化健康、增强免疫力和促进整体健康而设计。采用两种临床研究认证的日本益生菌菌株— 有助于改善肠道菌群、调节排便，并维持健康的体重

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Q’SAI Knee Supporter Collagen
programme.desc: QSAI Knee Supporter Collagen, cumulative sales exceed 50 million pieces as of Jan 2024, delivers highly absorbable collagen peptides, Hyaluronic Acid, and Chondroitin to nourish joints and cartilage, relieve joint pain. Its tasteless, odorless powder blends effortlessly into any food or drink, making it perfect for daily joint care, especially for those who prefer not to take pills. Q’SAI 膝之助胶原蛋白粉 QSAI 护膝胶原蛋白粉，截至2024年1月累计销量已超过5000万盒，富含高吸收性的胶原蛋白肽、玻尿酸和软骨素，有助滋养关节和软骨、缓解关节疼痛。其无味无臭的粉末状配方，可轻松加入任何食物或饮料中服用，是日常关节护理的理想之选，尤其适合那些不想服用药片的人士。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - OMRON BP Monitor Atrial Fibrillation HEM-7383T1
programme.desc: Stay ahead of your heart health now with the Omron BP monitor. With a single press of a button, you can now get your blood pressure readings and detect possible atrial fibrillation (AFib), helping you stay ahead of a potential stroke. OMRON 血压测量仪，一次测量即可获得血压和心律分析。通过Omron的智能算法，分析脉搏律动，帮助用户及早发现潜在心房颤动风险。心房颤动风险是脉搏间隔不规律的现象，提早发现有助于降低中风的风险。居家也能轻松监测心脏健康。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Philips Azur Steam Iron
programme.desc: The Philips Azur 8000 Series Steam Iron delivers powerful performance with OptimalTEMP technology, ensuring that no fabric will be burned. programme.desc: Dr Wu Ageversal Advanced Rejuvenate Eye Cream targets eye-area concerns such as fine lines, dullness, puffiness, and sagging, repairing skin and enhancing firmness. programme.title: River Monsters: Amazon Titanic - River Monsters: Amazon Titanic
programme.desc: It was supposed to be the safest boat in the Amazon, but when Sobral Santos II sank by the remote town of Obidos on the night of September 21st 1981 more than 300 people died. What had laid into the passengers?

programme.title: River Monsters - European Maneater
programme.desc: Biologist and extreme angler Jeremy Wade investigates tales of a man-eating catfish.

programme.title: River Monsters - Colombian Slasher
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade heads to Colombia to investigate a creature blamed for killing a new bride.

programme.title: River Monsters - Amazon Assassins
programme.desc: In the depths of the Amazon, legends tell of an evil spirit in a great fish.

programme.title: River Monsters - Japanese Horrors
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade is in Japan on the trail of the kappa, a fish about which legends abound.

programme.title: River Monsters - South Pacific Terrors
programme.desc: Attacks from unseen assailants in the remote mountains and jungles of Fiji's interior.

programme.title: River Monsters - The Mutilator
programme.desc: Extreme angler Jeremy Wade travels to Papua New Guinea.

programme.title: River Monsters - Secrets of the Sea
programme.desc: Jeremy goes behind the scenes and we see what went into the making of a season at sea.

programme.title: River Monsters - Congo Killer
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade travels to the Congo River on the trail of the legend of the spirit Mami Wata.

programme.title: River Monsters - Return of the Killer Catfish
programme.desc: Could the original River Monster be back from the brink and back in business?

programme.title: River Monsters - Body Snatcher
programme.desc: Jeremy is convinced a river monster is at large after hearing tales of a body-snatching.

programme.title: River Monsters - Atomic Assassin

programme.title: Nine Deaths of the Ninja
programme.desc: A group of drug runners/freedom fighters has kidnapped a busload of tourists in the Philippines and is threatening to kill them all if one of their partners is not released from prison and the government doesn't halt its anti-drug policies. To stop the criminals, a trio of specialist soldiers are called in. Even with all their training, will they be able to stop the terrorists when they begin killing hostages and turning loose their squads of attack midgets?

programme.title: Penitentiary
programme.desc: A hitchhiker gets arrested after a biker dies in a fight over a prostitute. In prison, he joins the boxing team to gain dominance and secure early parole from the toughest gang.

programme.title: A Bullet For The General
programme.desc: A band of Mexican gun-runners employed by a revolutionary general accept an American into their gang, unaware of his intentions.

programme.title: The Kidnapping of the President
programme.desc: A South American quasi-revolutionary/guerilla/terrorist and a misled, admiring girl compatriot manage to kidnap the U.S. President during a diplomatic visit to Toronto. With a nondescript armored truck, crudely yet somehow elaborately rigged with high explosives (and the President trapped inside), the two terrorists keep the Secret Service at bay until in the end, Assanti is killed and Shatner has to find a way into the truck anyway.

programme.title: Casper the Friendly Ghost - Casper the Friendly Ghost Ep1 - EP101
programme.desc: Depressed by the antics of the other ghosts, Casper leaves home to make friends. After unintentionally scaring several potential pals, Casper befriends two young children. They take him home, where Casper frightens their mother. Casper is again upset because he believes that he will always scare away his potential buddies. However, Casper scares away a banker who is coming to foreclose on the woman's house, and this wins her heart for Casper.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage - Pizza! Pizza! Pizza! - EP115
programme.desc: Shaq's favourite pizzeria is swamped with orders, luckily the Shaq Paq has nothing better to do that day, so they sign up to help deliver.

programme.title: The Twisted Tales of Felix the Cat - The Twisted Tales of Felix the Cat Ep8 - EP108
programme.desc: The beyond surreal adventures of Felix The Cat and his friends set in an incredibly weird and fantastical toon world where everything is alive and only dream logic rules. Each episode has three segments.

programme.title: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble - Kidaverse Roblox Rumble Ep9 - EP9
programme.desc: Eight kid gamers, ages eight to twelve, battle it out in ten different Roblox games to win prizes and find out who is the ultimate gamer! Video gamer, football star, and children’s book author Rashad Jennings hosts!

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Dignity - EP117
programme.desc: In this episode we will discover the value of dignity, finding that it goes hand in hand with self-love and self-esteem. We must value ourselves and respect ourselves first and then others. Being respectful is a rule to be able to live in harmony and dignity. It takes dignity to ask for forgiveness and to forgive!

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Urbanity - EP102
programme.desc: In this episode of Kids' Planet, Nova will guide the children through an exciting journey through the world of "Urbanity" where the children will discover that with a good attitude and respecting all people equally, their life will be more fun, happy, and surrounded by friends!

programme.desc: Being an ‘only lamb in the flock’ Timmy has been used to getting his own way. Now for the first time Timmy is going to have to learn to get along with other little animals. Timmy is going to Nursery! Self-willed and naughty Timmy is going to have to learn how to share things with other youngsters and think about their feelings – not just his. Timmy is a gifted little footballer who needs to learn that it’s not enough to kick the ball – you have to pass it too. Harriet Heron and Osbourne Owl, who run the Nursery are going to have their hands full, but Timmy gets it right in the end with a little help from his friends of the furry, feathery and spikey type.

programme.title: Misha, the Purple Cat
programme.desc: Misha is a very lively, alert cat. She is very interested in investigating everything going on around her, which means she has some very entertaining adventures with her friends. Many things can happen in Misha’s world; especially exciting adventures, mysterious investigations, hilarious competitions... all with a feeling of close friendship.

programme.title: Bino & Fino

programme.title: Horaci the Inuit

programme.title: (Live) News Tonight
programme.desc: The daily evening-news programme featuring highlights and coverage of both local and international news with a local perspective.

programme.title: Long Weekends - EP 7
programme.desc: Diving back into another episode of Long Weekends, we're going to the Koh Samui! Join Joakim as he explores the sunny Koh Samui island - visiting night markets, an ethical elephant sanctuary, free-roaming pig island and watching a fire show! Find out if Joakim manages to keep within the S600 budget!

programme.title: Scene City: Blender Mak
programme.desc: "Blender Mak" unfolds in a 1960s Singaporean kampong, focusing on Puan Timah, a modern Malay woman with the only blender in the village. Ramadan prompts her to showcase the blender, sparking clashes with traditional values. Simultaneously, Kwan You faces business challenges amid declining health. As the grand iftar approaches, Timah's reliance on the blender clashes with the kampong's values.

programme.title: Quantum Leap S1 - EP 7
programme.desc: Set 30 years after Dr. Sam Beckett stepped into the Quantum Leap accelerator and vanished, follows a new team that must restart the project hoping to understand the mysteries behind the machine and its creator.

programme.title: Watson S1 - EP 12
programme.desc: When part of the team falls ill after becoming targets of a sinister plot, it becomes an all-hands-on-deck situation to save them before it's too late. Meanwhile, Watson announces a new ambitious project that he has been working on, in this two-part season finale.

programme.title: Aunty Lee's Deadly Delights - EP 66
programme.desc: Aunty Lee and her gang find a feral child in a provision shop near Bukit Tinggi and set out on a quest to find the boy's missing parents.

programme.desc: Top Hosts Jason Yeoh & Jack Lim create priceless mother-son memories, on a journey of love to check off their moms' travel wish lists. Join them in HK, Malaysia & Singapore on customised vacations.

programme.title: Kampong Ties - EP 7 甘榜情
programme.desc: Shuixian is forced by her foster mother to marry Lihai, whom later died in an accident, leaving Shuixian a young widow. Yueman is married to Jiaqing, an abusive man. One day, Shuixian accidentally kills Jiaqing but is saved by Yueman who claims Jiaqing was killed by his creditors. Both of them leave the village and meet Youbao, head of a secret society.

programme.title: Kampong Ties - EP 8 甘榜情
programme.desc: Shuixian is forced by her foster mother to marry Lihai, whom later died in an accident, leaving Shuixian a young widow. Yueman is married to Jiaqing, an abusive man. One day, Shuixian accidentally kills Jiaqing but is saved by Yueman who claims Jiaqing was killed by his creditors. Both of them leave the village and meet Youbao, head of a secret society.

programme.title: Golden City - EP 507 多情城市
programme.desc: This drama is set in the Jiufen area from the 1960s to the 1970s. It tells the story of how three brothers conquered the world with their bare hands. Through the love story of the previous generation, it connects the common emotions between the two generations depicting the memories and in-depth exploration of the differences in values between them.

programme.title: Golden City - EP 508 多情城市
programme.desc: This drama is set in the Jiufen area from the 1960s to the 1970s. It tells the story of how three brothers conquered the world with their bare hands. Through the love story of the previous generation, it connects the common emotions between the two generations depicting the memories and in-depth exploration of the differences in values between them.

programme.title: Forbidding No More - EP 5 极境之旅
programme.desc: Iran, Cuba or North Korea are not exactly the most accessible countries. In fact most would balk at the idea of holidaying there. Stringent visa requirements and hard travel conditions are but some factors. But are they really inaccessible? "Forbidding No More" takes us to these countries to explore what culture and attractions these locations have to offer.

programme.title: News Tonight 晚间新闻
programme.desc: Daily evening updates on top local news and world news.

programme.title: My One And Only - EP 3 只此一家
programme.desc: Defu keeps Baoyou company at the hospital and reminisces their time together as ex-colleagues. He used to like her. Limin tags along when Renpin brings a client to view Mr. Lin's place. Mr. Lin scares the client off. Baoyou runs into Defu while buying chee cheong fun (flat rice noodle) and bursts into sudden tears.

programme.title: Kid U Not - EP 16 孩是老的辣
programme.desc: The trio learn Mary has dementia. Chris regrets how cruel he was to Mary. Manxin, Alex and Mary decide to convert the hotel into an e-sports hotel. Ching Har decides to embrace life and make new friends. Meizhen wants to have another child to replace her lost son, to Manle’s distress. He has a strange dream one night.

programme.title: Talk of The Town - EP 35 狮城热话
programme.desc: A half-hour talk-show segment in Hello Singapore which brings together diverse voices and expert opinions to thought-provoking discussions on wide range of issues. Incorporating online polls which gather public opinions, the segment creates a space that allows for multi viewpoints in the studio from Monday to Friday.

programme.title: Heroes in White - EP 19 侠医
programme.desc: When Yingchen proposes using a swimmer as the spokesperson for the new product, Yanzu strongly objects. Later, Yingchen discovers that Weimin’s younger sister, Minyi, was once a swimmer, which explains the emotional scar that Weimin has been carrying.

programme.desc: Jeremy Wade heads to the jungles of South America to track down a dangerous fish.

programme.title: River Monsters - Mongolian Mauler
programme.desc: In Mongolia, Jeremy Wade investigates a rare giant fish.

programme.title: River Monsters - Freshwater Shark
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates the myth of the freshwater shark.

programme.title: River Monsters - Phantom Assassin
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade returns to Australia's Fitzroy River on his toughest quest yet.

programme.title: River Monsters - American Killer Catfish
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade visits tourist hotspots in the USA in search of river monsters.

programme.title: River Monsters - Coral Reef Killer
programme.desc: A mysterious sea creature impales victims on the island of Sulawesi in Indonesia.

programme.title: River Monsters - Vampires of the Deep
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade embarks on a punishing mission to the Pacific Northwest.

programme.title: River Monsters - Death Ray
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade goes to Thailand in search of the 700lb giant freshwater stingray.

programme.title: River Monsters - Hidden Predator
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade goes to South Africa, where the biggest bull shark ever recorded was caught.

programme.title: River Monsters - Volcanic Island Terror
programme.desc: On a volcanic Pacific island, an ancient fishing community is being terrorised.

programme.title: River Monsters - Bone Crusher
programme.desc: In the remote Amazon, Jeremy Wade seeks a predator which cannot be caught with a rod.

programme.title: River Monsters - Secrets of the Sea
programme.desc: Jeremy goes behind the scenes and we see what went into the making of a season at sea.

programme.title: River Monsters - Mekong Mutilator
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade heads to south east Asia's Mekong river in search of a baby-faced killer.

programme.title: River Monsters - Alaska's Cold Water Killer
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates a fatal incident in Alaska - is an unidentified killer at large?

programme.title: River Monsters - Flesh Ripper
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade goes to New Zealand looking for a dangerous creature described 200 years ago.

programme.title: River Monsters - Legend of Loch Ness
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade is on a mission to track down the famous Loch Ness monster.

programme.title: River Monsters - Canadian Horror
programme.desc: The hunt for a 20-foot lake monster that attacks humans in Canada's wilderness.

programme.title: River Monsters - Russian Killer
programme.desc: The disappearance of three men in Russia proves to be a baffling case for Jeremy Wade.

programme.title: River Monsters - Jungle Terminator
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates three mysterious deaths in the remote western Amazon.

programme.title: River Monsters - Devil of the Deep
programme.desc: Jeremy goes on a dangerous mission where he discovers a deep-sea devil.

programme.title: River Monsters - Malaysian Lake Monster
programme.desc: Two men mysteriously vanish on a remote lake in Malaysia.

programme.title: River Monsters - Deep Sea Demon
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade goes in search of the truth behind the sea serpent legend.

programme.title: River Monsters - Razorhead
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates reports of a creature terrorizing the Florida Keys.

programme.title: River Monsters - Demon Fish
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade journeys up the Congo River in search of the ferocious Goliath Tiger Fish.

programme.title: River Monsters - Chainsaw Predator
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade is in the Australian outback trying to catch the rare freshwater sawfish.

programme.title: River Monsters - Pack of Teeth
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade is in southern Africa on the banks of the Okavango.

programme.title: River Monsters - Killers from the Abyss (Part 1)
programme.desc: Fishing detective, Jeremy Wade, takes on the biggest investigation of his career.

programme.title: The Kidnapping of the President
programme.desc: A South American quasi-revolutionary/guerilla/terrorist and a misled, admiring girl compatriot manage to kidnap the U.S. President during a diplomatic visit to Toronto. With a nondescript armored truck, crudely yet somehow elaborately rigged with high explosives (and the President trapped inside), the two terrorists keep the Secret Service at bay until in the end, Assanti is killed and Shatner has to find a way into the truck anyway.

programme.title: Death of a Ninja
programme.desc: A master ninja is sentenced to death and is forced to fight off numerous attackers.

programme.title: And God Said to Cain
programme.desc: A man takes his revenge on the family responsible for his wrongful sentence to ten years of hard labor.

With a nondescript armored truck, crudely yet somehow elaborately rigged with high explosives (and the President trapped inside), the two terrorists keep the Secret Service at bay until in the end, Assanti is killed and Shatner has to find a way into the truck anyway.

programme.title: Death of a Ninja
programme.desc: A master ninja is sentenced to death and is forced to fight off numerous attackers.

programme.title: Banana Joe
programme.desc: Banana Joe lives in a tropical village in Africa which is unaffected by modern life. One day he discovers he needs a permit to operate his boat so goes off to the big city to get one. On the way he witnesses television, crooks and many delights for the first time as well as falling in love.

programme.title: Hercules
programme.desc: The muscular Hercules performs his labors, sails with the Argonauts, and romances the fair Iole.

programme.title: River Of Death
programme.desc: An adventurer decides to go in search of a lost city in the Amazon jungle, and is joined by a motley crew of other people with reasons of their own. But to their horror, instead of treasure, they find a Nazi doctor occupying the lost city who is still doing his experiments on people.

programme.title: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble - Kidaverse Roblox Rumble Ep10 - EP10
programme.desc: Eight kid gamers, ages eight to twelve, battle it out in ten different Roblox games to win prizes and find out who is the ultimate gamer! Video gamer, football star, and children’s book author Rashad Jennings hosts!

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Confidence, Honesty, and Integrity - EP118
programme.desc: In this episode, we will discover the values of confidence, honesty and integrity. We will learn that we build trust by fulfilling the promises we make to others. Honesty means telling the truth, which also shows respect for others. We will understand that having integrity means that in addition to being honest, we also choose to do what is right.

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Behaviors at School - EP103
programme.desc: In this episode of Kids' Planet, Nova will invite the children to a new expedition, this time they will leave for school. Together, they will discover how they should behave in this space that is so important for their development. The children will also learn about their favourite part of the day: recess!

programme.title: Mellodees - London Bridge Is Falling Down - EP6
programme.desc: Playtime gets interrupted when Dee's four-legged friend, Treble knocks down his creation. No need to get upset though, Dee and Treble rebuild the bridge while smiling and laughing together. A great display of teamwork.

programme.title: Sunny Bunnies: Get Busy - Sunny Bunnies: Get Busy Ep2 - EP102
programme.desc: In a new spin-off series of mini-episodes - ‘Sunny Bunnies Get Busy’ - the characters are on hand to entertain and engage viewers in various colourful and creative activities and inspire children to 'Get Busy'.

programme.desc: Gisele and the Green Team help to save a shipment of endangered plants and animals.

programme.desc: An underwater treasure hunt quickly turns into a rescue operation.

programme.desc: JD creates a mini-universe to store his stuff but it grows wildly out of control and starts consuming everything - and everyone - in the lab. / Having wrought destruction on the Lab’s indoor greenhouse, JD seeks refuge from the consequences of his actions by escaping through the VR Window to the Stone Age.

programme.title: Mellodees - Hickory Dickory Dock - EP12
programme.desc: Mini Dee explores the inner workings of a clock in this magical adventure.

programme.title: Casper the Friendly Ghost - Casper the Friendly Ghost Ep2 - EP102
programme.desc: Depressed by the antics of the other ghosts, Casper leaves home to make friends. After unintentionally scaring several potential pals, Casper befriends two young children. They take him home, where Casper frightens their mother. Casper is again upset because he believes that he will always scare away his potential buddies. However, Casper scares away a banker who is coming to foreclose on the woman's house, and this wins her heart for Casper.

programme.desc: Mini Dee explores the inner workings of a clock in this magical adventure.

programme.title: Casper the Friendly Ghost - Casper the Friendly Ghost Ep3 - EP103
programme.desc: Depressed by the antics of the other ghosts, Casper leaves home to make friends. After unintentionally scaring several potential pals, Casper befriends two young children. They take him home, where Casper frightens their mother. Casper is again upset because he believes that he will always scare away his potential buddies. However, Casper scares away a banker who is coming to foreclose on the woman's house, and this wins her heart for Casper.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage - Tibbs in Charge - EP119
programme.desc: A mystery is afoot, toys have gone missing and it's up to the Shaq Pack to figure out what happened.

programme.title: The Twisted Tales of Felix the Cat - The Twisted Tales of Felix the Cat Ep10 - EP110
programme.desc: The beyond surreal adventures of Felix The Cat and his friends set in an incredibly weird and fantastical toon world where everything is alive and only dream logic rules. Each episode has three segments.

programme.title: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble - Kidaverse Roblox Rumble Ep11 - EP11
programme.desc: Eight kid gamers, ages eight to twelve, battle it out in ten different Roblox games to win prizes and find out who is the ultimate gamer! Video gamer, football star, and children’s book author Rashad Jennings hosts!

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Sports - EP119
programme.desc: In this episode, we will travel through the wonderful world of sports. We will learn the physical and mental benefits of practising a sport or physical activity. We will talk about the value of perseverance, training, and the importance of knowing how to win and how to lose. We will learn about different sports and disciplines and how to show respect to our opponents.

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Behaving on the Street and Minding Traffic Signs - EP104
programme.desc: Nova will invite children to a new expedition to become super pedestrians. Together, they will discover how they should behave in public spaces or streets. Curious will teach us the correct way to cross the street, know the traffic lights and traffic signals. They will also learn that the car is a very fun place that has rules to follow to enjoy and stay safe.

programme.title: Mellodees - Baa Baa Black Sheep - EP9
programme.desc: Join our dance party at The Farm. Dee shows the sheep how to get down.

programme.title: Sunny Bunnies: Get Busy - Sunny Bunnies: Get Busy Ep5 - EP105
programme.desc: In a new spin-off series of mini-episodes - ‘Sunny Bunnies Get Busy’ - the characters are on hand to entertain and engage viewers in various colourful and creative activities and inspire children to 'Get Busy'.

programme.title: Giselle and the Green Team - The Case of the Lawless Loggers - EP103
programme.desc: Gisele and the Green team once again fight Nick slick as he tries to clear cut a forest.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage - Gronk Did It! - EP120
programme.desc: A day volunteering at the Orlanta Animal Reserve turns into an ordeal as an elephant escapes its enclosure.

programme.title: Thomas Edison's Secret Lab - Static Monstro-City / I-Yi-Yi Robot - EP117
programme.desc: When JD and Kent accidentally create a static electricity charged laundry monster, it rampages through town. With the help of Robert Van de Graaff they find a way to defeat the monster’s static cling. / When the Antimatters create a rogue robot, it’s up to the Secret Lab Kids to save the day.

programme.title: Mellodees - Humpty Dumpty - EP15

Bino and Fino have many adventures where, with the help of their friend Zeena the Magic Butterfly, they discover and learn things about the world.

programme.title: Timmy Time
programme.desc: Being an ‘only lamb in the flock’ Timmy has been used to getting his own way. Now for the first time Timmy is going to have to learn to get along with other little animals. Timmy is going to Nursery! Self-willed and naughty Timmy is going to have to learn how to share things with other youngsters and think about their feelings – not just his. Timmy is a gifted little footballer who needs to learn that it’s not enough to kick the ball – you have to pass it too. Harriet Heron and Osbourne Owl, who run the Nursery are going to have their hands full, but Timmy gets it right in the end with a little help from his friends of the furry, feathery and spikey type.

programme.desc: An oddball buddy series between an over ambitious boy, Jack and his pal Moose, a melodramatic self-confessed expert in everything. Except he isn't! Despite his best intentions, he always messes up and although Jack may not get what he want, you can't help being sucked in by Moose's relentless optimism and zest for life!

programme.title: Grojband
programme.desc: The story about 12 year old Corey that emotionally torments his sister so that she will write the ultimate lyrics for his garage band.

programme.title: Eliot Kid
programme.desc: When a tooth falling out turns into a hunt for the “giant mouse”, when the city’s sewers transform into Indiana Jones’ white rapids or when a trip to the toilets becomes an expedition to a haunted house, well then you’ve entered the wonderful world of Eliot Kid!

programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other's company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

Flo doesn’t think of Ebb as a dog, and Ebb doesn’t think of Flo as a small human, they just are the best of friends. Until Bird arrives to lovingly disrupt Ebb’s world. Ebb and Flo’s home is an old boat moored by the beach. Things Couldn’t Be Better!
